name: JenniNexus Video System
description: YouTube playlist and RSS feed system. NO API REQUIRED - uses RSS feeds and public playlist IDs only.
architecture: RSS-based (no YouTube API key needed), server-side proxy caching
api_status: NOT USED - RSS feeds only, no API credentials required
versionNotes: v3.2.2 (2025-11-11): Fixed RSS channel assignments - @jenniplaysgames for gaming, @diywjenni for DIY. v3.2.1: Verified cache security. v3.2: Added video embedding patterns. v3.1: Fixed youtube.php RSS proxy. v3.0: Complete RSS architecture.

rss_feeds.description: Active YouTube RSS Feeds - NO API KEY NEEDED

jenninexus_main.content: Main channel - all content types (gaming, gamedev, DIY, music, AI)
jenninexus_main.note: Previous ID UCu1S6_Gza2Y06pT1n5U_L4Q was incorrect - correct ID is UCMdVZ64zYbNZ5jBhaa7VxQA

jenniplaysgames.content: Gaming Let's Plays, walkthroughs, horror games, indie games

diywjenni.content: DIY fashion, beauty, nail art, hair tutorials, self-care

troubleshooting.404_error: Channel ID is invalid, channel deleted, or set to private. Verify channel exists by visiting https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC...
troubleshooting.502_error: Server-side proxy failed to fetch RSS feed. Check cache directory exists, PHP allow_url_fopen enabled.
troubleshooting.no_videos: RSS feed returns empty entry array. Channel may have no public videos or be brand new.
troubleshooting.cors_error: Must use server-side proxy (get-youtube.php). Direct RSS fetch from browser will fail CORS.

core_proxy.description: Server-side proxy for YouTube RSS feeds

files.description: Fetches YouTube RSS feeds, converts XML to JSON, caches results
files.note: NO API - only fetches public RSS feeds

client_javascript.description: Client-side JavaScript for rendering video grids

files.description: Renders responsive video grids from YAML configs, fetches via proxy

api.loadPageConfig: Loads YAML config (e.g., youtube.yaml) and renders playlists
api.renderPlaylistSection: Renders playlist section with custom config

yaml_configs.description: YAML configuration files for video playlists

files.description: Featured playlists for /youtube page (8 playlists across all categories)
YouTube hub page - RSS feed + 8 featured playlists
features: RSS feed: Latest 12 videos from @jenninexus channel

files.description: DIY page with RSS feed (4 latest videos from @diywjenni)
Game jams page - simplified 1 video per playlist
Exists but NOT USED - RSS mode doesn't need API credentials
files.status: archived - kept for future API features if needed

contains.note: Channel/playlist IDs are PUBLIC - not secrets

rss_architecture.description: How RSS feeds work (no API needed)
flow: 2. Proxy fetches RSS XML from YouTube (public, no auth)
5. Client JS renders videos in responsive grid

workflow.1_update_yaml: Edit gaming.yaml, youtube.yaml, etc. - add playlist IDs and tags
workflow.2_verify_ids: Check playlist IDs are public (start with PL...) or channel IDs (UC...)
workflow.3_test_rss: Manually test RSS URL in browser to verify it's accessible
workflow.5_test_page: Visit page, check browser console for fetch errors
workflow.6_check_cache: Verify cache files created at storage/cache/youtube/

critical_rules: NO API KEY NEEDED - RSS feeds are public
Channel IDs start with 'UC', playlist IDs start with 'PL'
Hardcode proxy paths in JS: '/resources/api/get-youtube.php' (not <?= RES_ROOT ?>)
Cache is essential - don't hit YouTube RSS too frequently
ALWAYS set aspect_ratio: '16:9' in YAML section configs (featured_section, learning_section, etc.)
Use .ratio.ratio-16x9 Bootstrap classes for consistent video/image displays
Blog post thumbnails must use ratio-16x9 containers with object-fit: cover
Playlist cards inherit aspect_ratio from section config or default to 16:9

integration_points.tag_system: youtube-grid.js sets data-tags on playlist cards for filtering
integration_points.theme_system: Video grids inherit theme colors from page-specific CSS
integration_points.blog_thumbnails: Blog cards use .ratio.ratio-16x9 with object-fit: cover
integration_points.gamedev_playlists: All gamedev sections specify aspect_ratio: '16:9' in YAML
integration_points.media_css: Core video/card styles centralized in media.css (hover, transitions, ratios)

video_embedding_patterns.description: How videos are embedded across different page types

workflow: 1. Load js-yaml CDN script (in head.php or page)
4. Playlists automatically render into containers defined in YAML

gaming_php_example.containers: HTML containers with IDs matching YAML container_id fields
gaming_php_example.res_root_usage: <?= RES_ROOT ?> for script paths, RES_ROOT constant defined in head.php

game_pages.pattern: Nested directory - define RES_ROOT, use __DIR__ for includes
game_pages.res_root_usage: Inherits from head.php (defined at top of file)

resources_access.note: RES_ROOT resolves to '/resources' - always use in PHP, never in JS template literals

video_embedding.method: data-playlist attribute on container + youtube-grid.js auto-init

blog_pages.pattern: Nested directory - define RES_ROOT if needed, use relative includes

resources_access.note: Blog metadata in YAML, blog content in individual PHP files

video_embedding.note: Blog pages can embed related video playlists inline in content

example_voice_acting_php.note: RES_ROOT defined defensively before includes, playlist embedded inline

blog_listing_integration.renders: Blog post cards with metadata (title, excerpt, image, date, category, tags)

res_root_patterns.description: How RES_ROOT is used across different page types

nested_game_pages.res_root_defined: Inherited from head.php (no need to redefine)
nested_game_pages.resources: <?= RES_ROOT ?> for web URLs (CSS, JS, images, YAML)
nested_game_pages.critical: Use __DIR__ for includes (filesystem), RES_ROOT for assets (web URLs)

nested_blog_pages.why_defensive: Blog pages may be accessed directly or via router, ensures RES_ROOT exists

javascript_usage.wrong: fetch(`<?= RES_ROOT ?>/api/get-youtube.php`) - PHP doesn't interpolate in JS
javascript_usage.rule: NEVER use <?= RES_ROOT ?> inside JavaScript template literals

files: blog-posts.yaml - Blog metadata (title, excerpt, image, tags, playlist)

image_paths.general_rule: Always use <?= RES_ROOT ?>/images/... in HTML, ensures correct paths in nested pages

aspect_ratio_system.description: Control video thumbnail aspect ratios across different content types (added Nov 9, 2025)

yaml_configuration.location: Can be set at section level or individual playlist level

16:9.examples: YouTube videos, gaming content, tutorials, Let's Plays
16:9.percentage: 95% of content - default for all playlists

9:16.examples: YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, TikTok, mobile recordings

4:3.examples: Retro games (NES, SNES, PS1), old TV shows, presentations

1:1.examples: Instagram posts, album artwork, profile pictures, icons

21:9.examples: Ultrawide gaming (3440x1440), cinematic trailers, professional video

bootstrap_classes.description: Bootstrap 5.3.8 provides native ratio utility classes
bootstrap_classes.how_it_works: Bootstrap ratio utility maintains aspect ratio using CSS padding-top trick

default_behavior.no_config: If aspect_ratio not specified in YAML, defaults to 16:9
default_behavior.invalid_value: If invalid format provided, logs warning and defaults to 16:9

applied_in_functions: createPlaylistCard() - reads from sectionConfig.aspect_ratio or playlist.aspect_ratio
createVideoThumbnail(video, index, aspectRatio) - accepts aspectRatio parameter
loadSingleVideoPreview(playlistId, container, aspectRatio) - passes to preview
loadPlaylistVideos(playlistId, maxResults, container, aspectRatio) - passes to thumbnails
renderVideoGrid(container, videos, options) - options.aspectRatio passed through

gaming_php_carousel.implementation: Hardcoded <div class="ratio ratio-16x9"> for iframe embeds
gaming_php_carousel.note: Carousel slides use hardcoded ratio, not YAML config

gaming_php_playlists.note: Was incorrectly set to 9:16 (portrait), fixed to 16:9 (landscape)

youtube_php_rss_feed.note: RSS feed video cards in 3-column grid

blog_php_cards.implementation: Uses CSS object-fit: cover with max-height: 200px
blog_php_cards.note: Blog cards deliberately crop to fixed height, different design pattern

gamedev_diy_pages.note: No explicit aspect_ratio set, youtube-grid.js applies default 16:9

troubleshooting.stretched_videos: Check YAML aspect_ratio matches actual video format (16:9 vs 9:16)
troubleshooting.ratio_not_applying: Check console for 'Invalid aspect ratio' warnings, inspect element for ratio class
troubleshooting.blog_images_cropping: Expected behavior - blog.php uses object-fit: cover, not ratio classes

configuration_workflow.description: Step-by-step guide for configuring video sections with thumbnails, aspect ratios, grid columns, and tags (added Nov 9, 2025)

step_1_yaml_definition.purpose: Define playlist content and display settings

required_fields.title: Page title for metadata
required_fields.playlists: Array of playlist objects with id, title, icon, tags, aspect_ratio

validation: Playlist IDs must start with 'PL' (YouTube playlist format)
Tags must exist in tags.json or filtering breaks
Aspect ratio must be one of: 16:9, 9:16, 4:3, 1:1, 21:9
Column objects must have numeric values for xs/sm/md/lg
Section names ending in _section map to #{name}-playlists HTML containers

step_2_fetch_thumbnails.purpose: Download static thumbnails for faster loading and offline fallback
what_it_does: Reads YAML file and extracts all playlist IDs
Fetches each playlist RSS feed from YouTube
Rate limits to 1-second delay between requests
step_2_fetch_thumbnails.quality: 480x360 (hqdefault) from RSS feed, higher than constructed URLs (320x180 mqdefault)
step_2_fetch_thumbnails.optional: Not required but recommended - youtube-grid.js fetches from RSS at runtime if missing
step_2_fetch_thumbnails.empty_playlists: Run create-*-placeholders.ps1 scripts for gradient placeholders

step_3_html_container.purpose: Add container div for youtube-grid.js to populate

required_structure.container_id: Must match YAML section name pattern: {section}-playlists

step_3_html_container.example:
Section Title

Loading...
step_3_html_container.naming_convention: YAML section 'featured_section' → HTML ID 'featured-playlists' (remove _section, add -playlists, replace _ with -)

step_4_javascript_loader.purpose: Load YAML config and render all sections
step_4_javascript_loader.location: Page footer after youtube-grid.js script tag
dependencies: Bootstrap 5.3.8 CSS (for grid and aspect ratio classes)
what_happens: js-yaml parses YAML into JavaScript object
For each section, youtube-grid.js creates playlist cards
Applies aspect ratio classes, grid columns, tags, thumbnails

step_5_configure_tags.purpose: Ensure all tags used in YAML exist in tags.json

tag_structure.name: Display name (e.g., 'Game Development')
tag_structure.category: One of: gaming, gamedev, diy, music, meta, blog

step_5_configure_tags.usage: youtube-grid.js sets data-tags='gaming,fps,horror' attribute on playlist cards for tag-system.js filtering

test_checklist: Check console: '✅ Loading playlists from {page}.yaml' and '✅ Playlists loaded successfully'
Desktop: Correct number of columns per section
Thumbnails load from RSS feed or fallback
Tag badges clickable and link to /tag/index.php?slug=...
step_6_build_and_test.common_issues: See YOUTUBE.md 'Troubleshooting by System' section for detailed fixes

complete_example.scenario: Add new 'Music Production' section to music.php
step_by_step: 1. Create music.yaml with music_production_section, 4 playlists, aspect_ratio: '16:9', columns: {xs:1, sm:2, md:3, lg:4}, tags
3. Add to music.php:
6. Test: Visit http://localhost:8002/music, check console, verify grid, test responsive, check tags
complete_example.yaml_snippet:
music_production_section:
  aspect_ratio: '16:9'
  columns: {xs: 1, sm: 2, md: 3, lg: 4}
  playlists:
    - id: 'PL...'
      title: 'Music Production Tips'
      icon: 'music-note'
      tags: ['music', 'production', 'tutorial']

videos_not_loading: Check browser console for fetch() errors
Test RSS URL directly in browser
Check server cache directory permissions: storage/cache/youtube/
Look for PHP errors in get-youtube.php
empty_grid: Check YAML file exists and has correct playlist IDs
Check grid container ID matches YAML container_id
Look for JavaScript errors in console
